intro_modal.title: Bank account connection
intro_modal.fact_prefix: Companies that connect their primary bank account are
intro_modal.fact_suffix: to qualify for extended payment terms and higher credit limits.
intro_modal.benefit_1: Increase the chances of getting better payment terms.
intro_modal.benefit_2: Real-time cash flow analysis speeds up approval.

bank_selection.subtitle: Select your financial institution to get started

reconciliation.title: Automated Reconciliation
reconciliation.description: Automatically match your bank transactions with invoices and payments.

balance.title: Real-time Balance
balance.description: Get up-to-date account balances and transaction history.

cashflow.title: Cash Flow Insights
cashflow.description: Better understand your financial position with integrated bank data.

security.title: Secure Connection
security.description: Bank-level security with encrypted data transmission and OAuth authentication.

bank_credentials.description: Enter your {{bank}} credentials to connect your account to this application.

bank_accounts.title: Your accounts
bank_accounts.description: This application requires access to all these {{bank}} accounts.
bank_accounts.info_description: We'll securely access your account data to provide automated reconciliation and real-time financial insights.

erp_selection.subtitle: Select your ERP or accounting software to automate your business processes
erp_selection.search_placeholder: Search by ERP name or category

automation.title: Automated Data Sync
automation.description: Synchronize invoices, customers, and financial data between systems.

realtime.title: Real-time Updates
realtime.description: Get instant updates when transactions are processed in your ERP system.

manual.title: Reduced Manual Work
manual.description: Eliminate duplicate data entry and reduce human errors.

unified.title: Unified View
unified.description: Combine ERP and payment data for a complete financial picture.

mydata.name: myDATA

entersoftone.name: ENTERSOFTONE

xero.name: Xero
xero.description: Cloud-based accounting platform for small businesses with bank reconciliation and expense management.

sage.name: Sage
sage.description: Business management suite covering accounting, payroll, HR, and ERP capabilities.

sap.name: SAP
sap.description: Global enterprise software leader delivering SAP S/4HANA, SAP Business One, and cloud ERP solutions.

oracle.name: Oracle
oracle.description: Provider of enterprise cloud applications including Oracle ERP Cloud and NetSuite.

microsoft-dynamics.name: Microsoft Dynamics
microsoft-dynamics.description: Suite of cloud business applications spanning finance, sales, and operations.

erp_credentials.description: Enter your {{erp}} credentials to establish a secure connection and sync your business data.

orders.title: Order Synchronization
orders.description: Automatically sync orders, products, and inventory data.

customers.title: Customer Data
customers.description: Access comprehensive customer information and purchase history.

realtime.title: Real-time Updates
realtime.description: Get instant notifications when orders are placed or products are updated.

analytics.title: Unified Analytics
analytics.description: Combine e-commerce data with financial and ERP data for reporting.

woocommerce.description: Open-source e-commerce plugin for WordPress with deep customization and a vast extension ecosystem.

shopify.name: Shopify
shopify.description: Cloud-based platform to build online stores, manage products, and process payments end-to-end.

magento.name: Magento

skroutz.name: Skroutz
skroutz.description: Greek marketplace and price comparison platform connecting merchants with millions of consumers.

ebay.name: eBay
ebay.description: Global marketplace with auction and fixed-price listings spanning countless product categories.

etsy.name: Etsy
etsy.description: Marketplace focused on handmade, vintage, and unique goods for creative entrepreneurs.

other.name: Other
other.description: Connect a custom platform using API credentials or OAuth when it's not listed above.

social_media.description: Add your social media profiles to complete your business profile
social_media.info_description: Social media profiles help us provide better customer insights.

shareholders.info_title: Add all the UBOs of your company
shareholders.info_p1: We are required to verify the individuals who ultimately own or control your company.
shareholders.info_p2: This usually means people who own 25%+ of shares or voting rights.
shareholders.info_p3: All UBOs will receive an email to complete the identity verification process, which only involves taking a couple of photos. No video verification is required.

trade_references.description: Please provide contact details for your suppliers to help us verify your trading history.

terms.general_text: I accept the General Terms, App/Web Terms, Privacy Notice, and Prohibited Activities. This includes allowing Factora to verify business and financial information via official sources for KYC/AML.
terms.client_text: I accept the Client Agreement. Covers fees and obligations. See pricing for applicable charges.
terms.banking_text: I authorize Open Banking access. Allows secure retrieval of balances and transactions to provide services, per regulations.
terms.communications_text: I agree to receive communications. You can unsubscribe or change preferences anytime.

data_processing.submitted_application_title: Your application has been successfully submitted!

mydata.header: Connect with your Digital Accounting and Tax Application
mydata.consent_text: By clicking "Access myDATA", you consent to our application retrieving your financial data from the official myDATA platform. All data usage complies with ΑΑΔΕ's privacy policy and GDPR regulations.

bank_consent.title: Connect to {{bank}}
bank_consent.subtitle: Consent to connect via TPP
bank_consent.description: Please review and agree to using a regulated Third-Party Provider (TPP) under PSD2/Open Banking to securely connect.

items.item1: Factora uses a regulated Third-Party Provider (TPP) under PSD2/Open Banking.
items.item2: You'll be redirected to your bank to authenticate and approve access (SCA).

items.item1: Basic account details (e.g., account name/IBAN), balances, and recent transactions—only for the accounts you choose.
items.item2: You can stop sharing at any time.

duration.title: How long access lasts
duration.description: Access is time-limited and typically requires consent reconfirmation around every 90 days in the UK/EU model.

erp_consent.title: Connect {{erp}}
erp_consent.subtitle: Provide your API credentials or sign in to authorize access.

platform_consent.title: Connect {{platform}}
platform_consent.subtitle: Provide your API credentials or sign in to authorize access.

abandon_confirmation.title: Abandon Bank Connection?
abandon_confirmation.description: You are about to abandon the bank account connection process. Are you sure you want to continue?

kyc.option_device_desc: Use your computer's camera for verification
kyc.option_mobile_desc: Receive a link via SMS or scan QR code

status.support_hours: Our support team is available Monday–Friday, 9:00 AM – 6:00 PM (EET)

documents.title: Some additional documents are needed, please upload them in the form below.
